description_long: This is a robust flat training bench with an integrated barbell rack, commonly found in gyms and outdoor fitness areas. The bench features a padded, elongated seat and backrest, both covered in a smooth, dark material, likely synthetic leather or vinyl. The supporting frame is constructed from sturdy metal tubing, finished in a metallic or dark paint, and includes two upright posts with barbell holders at the top. The barbell, with visible knurling and collars, rests securely on the rack, extending horizontally across the width of the bench. The base of the frame is wide and stable, designed to prevent tipping during use. There are no visible decorative elements, and the design prioritizes function and durability for weight training exercises.
description: A sturdy, flat training bench with a padded seat and metal frame, featuring an integrated barbell rack and barbell. Designed for weight training, it has a functional, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded bench, upright posts, and the barbell resting on the rack.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bench and the depth of the supporting frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bench and the barbell rack structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bench's length and the barbell's position on the rack.
